CREDITS

Tekken Style JS Fighter

Built with Three.js

Fighter models, animations, and arena assets from public domain sources.

Sound effects from free sound libraries.

Special thanks to the open-source community.

Heavy





P1 LEFT: A/D move, W jump, S block/crouch, Q or Z punch, E or C kick, X heavy
Arena: switch between loaded arenas via dropdown above. Tune position, then Copy config and send it.
